data.body: Correction (2026-04-26): the C3 coordination SC posted earlier today references PRECONDITIONS data structures that did not yet include the degradation: true field. The PRECONDITIONS infrastructure itself is closed (736d-b957) but the degradation extension has been redirected to c183-ed2a (see its 2026-04-26 comments). C3's coordination dependency therefore shifts from 736d-b957 (foundation, closed) to c183-ed2a (degradation extension, open). Suggested SC update: 'verifier reads PRECONDITIONS degradation: true entries (delivered by c183-ed2a) and refuses closure when unacknowledged; this is in addition to the truths/artifacts/key_links verification this epic delivers.' Soft sequencing: c183-ed2a's degradation field SC must ship before this verifier check can be implemented end-to-end.
